AlysonSerenix

😈 I’m not toxic. I’m selective. CEO of TwinYield.com
Free members must upgrade to Paid membership to buy daily tasks. For any login or account issues, contact AlysonSerenix on Facebook. TwinYield company is not responsible for transactions with any other parties.
Contact AlysonSerenix on Facebook

Free → Paid Member Upgrade

Year Price (USDT TRC20)
2026 25$
2027 30$
2028 35$
2029 40$
2030 50$

Starting from 2030, users will need to pay $50 to upgrade from Free to Paid membership. Before that year, they can try to become a Paid member at the previous prices.

Daily Task Price

Task Price Monthly Income Details
40$ 1 website visit per month. Profit 0.5$ Multiple purchases allowed

Profit Calculation

1. One Task Means = 1 website visit per month. Profit 0.5$ Lifetime.

2. User can buy unlimited tasks via admin. More Task means more profit for Lifetime.

3. Refund anytime for purchased tasks.

4. Admin deducts $10 for account deactivation & server cancelation costs.

5. Remaining funds instantly refunded.

Referral Income per User

Year Income per referral
2026 2$
2027 4$
2028 6$
2029 8$
2030 10$

From 2030 a paid member will earn $10 per user only when a new user joins using their referral link and upgrades from Free to Paid membership. User can refer unlimited users. Income is added automatically.

Refund Policy

After becoming a Paid member, whatever number of tasks a user purchases, no matter the total amount.

For example, if a Paid member buys 10 tasks at $40 each, spending a total of $400

If the user wants to cancel all tasks and get a full refund, the admin will process it.

Only a $10 fee for Account Deactivation and Server Cancellation will be deducted, and the remaining $390 will be refunded to the user.

However, at the time of refund, the user must provide their account secret key and the email used to create the account.

So the admin can verify that they are the legitimate account owner.

TRX Tron (TRC20)

We accept only TRX Tron (TRC20) USDT Crypto payment method. To upgrade from a free user to a paid member and to purchase daily tasks, users must pay via this method. We do not offer any other payment methods.

Official Fb Page link :

https://www.facebook.com/AlysonSerenix

Payments made on this page are valid. We are not responsible for payments made elsewhere.
